networkAccess.reasoning: Calls api.lemonsqueezy.com/v1/licenses/activate and /validate to activate and periodically re-validate Pro license keys. The only data sent is the user-entered license key and an opaque activation instance name derived from the Figma user ID (format: figma-{userId}). No design content, layer names, node data, images, or file metadata is read by or transmitted from this plugin.
